heading: Payment by foreign currency
label: 6316 Payment by foreign currency
text: The Secretary is authorized in his discretion to allow payment of taxes in the currency of a foreign country under such circumstances and subject to such conditions as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe.
notes: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary” in two places.Pub. L. 94–455
amendments: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary” in two places.Pub. L. 94–455
